title: DNA extration for the R. crenulata genome

steps: Collect and cut 200mg of fresh leaves. undetermined
Add tissues and liquid nitrogen in mortar, grind them into powder with a pestle.
Transfer the powder in a centrifuge tube with 1ml of pre-heated CTAB lysis buffer and then mix them. undetermined Volume of the tube: 2ml
Incubate the tube for 1 hour at 65°C in the recirculating water bath with mixing gently every 5-10 min. 01:00:00 Prolong the lysis time to lyse completely if necessary.
Cool the centrifuge tube to room temperature and centrifuge it at 13,600rpm for 10min at 4°C. 00:10:00
Transfer the supernatant in a new tube. Tube -- 2.0ml, marked Tube -- 2.0ml, marked
Add the same volume of Phenol : Chloroform : Isoamylol (25: 24: 1) and mix by gentle inversion for 3-5 min at room temperature. 00:05:00
Centrifuge at 13,600rpm for 10min at 4°C. 00:10:00
Transfer the supernatant aqueous phase in a new tube. Tube -- 2.0ml, marked
Add the same volume of Chloroform : Isoamylol (24 : 1) and mix by gently inverting for 3-5min at room temperature. 00:05:00
Centrifuge at 13,600rpm for 10min at 4°C. 00:10:00
Transfer the supernatant aqueous phase in a new tube. Tube -- 2.0ml, marked
Add 2/3 volume of Isopropanol and 1/10 volume of 3M ammonium acetate, and then mix by slowy inverting.
Incubate the tube at -20°C for overnight. 16:00:00
Centrifuge at 13,600rpm for 10min at 4°C and discard the supernatant. 00:10:00
Add 1ml of 70% of ethanol, flick the centriguge tube to resuspend the pellet. undetermined
Wash the DNA pellet for 3-5min. 00:05:00
Centrifuge at 13,000rpm for 5min at 4°C, discard the ethanol. 00:05:00
Add 1ml of 70% ethanol and mix gently. undetermined
Centrifuge at 13,000rpm for 5min at 4°C, discard the ethanol. 00:05:00
Centrifuge at 13,000rpm for 30s, discard the liquid. 00:00:30
Air dry the pellet for 5-10min at room temperature. 00:10:00
Add RNase and 100µl of TE buffer (TE : RNase = 100:1), and then dissolve the pellet at 37°C for 30min in the Thermomixer. 00:30:00
